$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the bridge's identity constants that are not derivable from another artifact. The extension ID is NOT declared here - it is DERIVED from extension/manifest.json's `key` (Chrome's id derivation); scripts/check-extension-id.ts recomputes it and verifies every copy (installers, generated TS). The native-messaging host id IS declared here: scripts/gen-ops.ts emits it into packages/shared/src/identity.gen.ts (which the extension imports for connectNative), and scripts/check-extension-id.ts verifies the Rust host and the installers against it. Chrome allows only [a-z0-9._] in host ids.
